title: IssueFieldOption
description: Details of the options for a select list issue field.

id.description: The unique identifier for the option. This is only unique within the select field's set of options.

properties.description: The properties of the object, as arbitrary key-value pairs. These properties can be searched using JQL, if the extractions (see [Issue Field Option Property Index](https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/jira/platform/modules/issue-field-option-property-index/)) are defined in the descriptor for the issue field module.

value.description: The option's name, which is displayed in Jira.
